spec_match.rationale: The carousel uses the spec values none and auto and styles marker anchors with :target-current.

interactive.rationale: Visitors can toggle marker grouping, use previous and next controls, click anchors, and drive the scrollers with arrow keys.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page demonstrates real anchor-based carousel markers rather than generated pseudo-element controls.

edge_cases.rationale: Keyboard operation, unsupported-browser fallback styling, and two independent marker groups are covered.

references.rationale: The page links to chromestatus.com/feature/5189126177161216 and the CSS Overflow 5 spec.

design_system.rationale: The demo uses shared CSS variables and avoids custom button color overrides.

summary: The carousel concept now has real controls, keyboard handling, live active-marker readouts, an auto/none switch, and a second independent carousel group.
